ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the current season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the current season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's kit */,
  "secondary_color" TEXT /* Secondary color of the team's kit */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Player's preferred foot */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player in millions of currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the game belongs to */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the game */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium where the game is played */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "tv_channel" TEXT /* TV channel broadcasting the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the standing belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season year */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals for - goals against) */,
  "played_games" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position of the team in the standings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season year */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Goals conceded by the player (for defenders and goalkeepers) */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (for defenders and goalkeepers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season year */,
  "home_team_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the home team */,
  "away_team_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the away team */,
  "home_team_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the home team */,
  "away_team_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the away team */,
  "home_team_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_team_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the away team */,
  "home_team_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the home team */,
  "away_team_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, team manager, player, fan) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytic_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the result */,
  "query" TEXT /* Query used to generate the result */,
  "result" TEXT /* Actual result of the query */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytic result was generated */,
  "query_duration" REAL /* Duration in seconds it took to execute the query */,
  "is_saved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the result is saved for future reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytic_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
